questions.prompt: By default, where does a Print Later job sit between submission and release?
choices: On the Printix Cloud, in vendor-managed storage
On the printer itself, until the user authenticates
questions.explanation: Out-of-the-box, the Printix Client stores the encrypted job on the user's computer. To survive an offline computer, the customer enables their own cloud storage (Azure Blob Storage or Google Cloud Storage).

questions.prompt: Print Anywhere lets a user release the same job at any Printix-managed printer they walk up to.
questions.explanation: Printix Anywhere is the roaming queue. Print Later goes to one specific printer; Print Anywhere lets the user pick the release printer at the point of release.
